hotel.name: Park Regis Goa
hotel.description: Park Regis Goa is a five-star deluxe resort offering luxury accommodation in Arpora, India. Located in a leafy area near the Baga River, we are ideally situated within close proximity to Goa's iconic Baga, Anjuna, and Calangute beaches. Our 114 well-appointed rooms and suites feature colorful accents, Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, minibars, and tea and coffeemaking facilities; some offer balconies. Guests can enjoy our outdoor pool with a sundeck and bar, a fitness center, an informal buffet restaurant with a show kitchen, and an elegant lobby piano bar. We also boast the largest event space in North Goa, with a ballroom accommodating up to 1500 guests.

dining.name: Kai Asian Speciality Restaurant
dining.description: Experience the exotic flavors of Asia at Kai Asian Speciality Restaurant. Our chefs prepare authentic dishes using the freshest ingredients, promising a culinary journey for your senses.
dining.shortDescription: Savor authentic Asian cuisine in an elegant setting.

dining.name: Spice'd Coffee Shop
dining.description: Overlooking the hotel's expansive grounds, Spice'd offers a contemporary and relaxing atmosphere for breakfast, lunch, or dinner. Witness our local chefs craft sumptuous delicacies right before your eyes.
dining.shortDescription: A contemporary all-day dining experience with live cooking stations and scenic views.

dining.name: Piano Bar
dining.description: Located on the Lobby Level, the Piano Bar is the perfect venue to gather with family and friends, enjoying your preferred beverage in a sophisticated ambiance. It's an ideal setting for cocktail parties, business events, or intimate rendezvous. Choose from an extensive selection of cocktails, champagne, single-malt whiskies, and more.
dining.shortDescription: An elegant lobby bar offering a wide selection of drinks and a refined atmosphere.

dining.name: Kai Pool Bar
dining.description: Relax and refresh at the Kai Pool Bar, offering a selection of light bites and refreshing beverages by the poolside. Enjoy the sun and unwind with your favorite drink.
dining.shortDescription: A vibrant poolside bar serving refreshing drinks and snacks.

experiences.name: Outdoor Pool With Sundeck And Bar
experiences.description: Relax and unwind by the hotel's outdoor pool, complete with a sundeck for lounging and a convenient poolside bar for refreshing drinks.
experiences.shortDescription: Enjoy a refreshing dip and drinks at the outdoor pool with sundeck and bar.

experiences.name: Fitness Room
experiences.description: Maintain your fitness routine in the hotel's well-equipped fitness room.
experiences.shortDescription: Stay active during your stay at our fitness room.

experiences.name: Informal Buffet Restaurant
experiences.description: Savor a variety of dishes at the informal buffet restaurant, featuring a show kitchen for an engaging dining experience.
experiences.shortDescription: Dine at our informal buffet restaurant with an exciting show kitchen.

experiences.name: Elegant Lobby Piano Bar
experiences.description: Unwind in the elegant lobby piano bar, offering a sophisticated ambiance for evening relaxation and entertainment.
experiences.shortDescription: Enjoy a refined evening with live music at our elegant lobby piano bar.

experiences.name: Baga Beach Excursion
experiences.description: Explore the vibrant Baga Beach, known for its lively atmosphere and water activities, just 3 km from the hotel.
experiences.shortDescription: Visit the popular Baga Beach for sun, sand, and fun.

experiences.name: Chapora Fort Visit
experiences.description: Discover the historical Chapora Fort, offering panoramic views and a glimpse into the region's past, located 5 km away.
experiences.shortDescription: Explore the historic Chapora Fort with stunning views.

experiences.name: Saturday Night Market / Bazaar
experiences.description: Immerse yourself in the lively atmosphere of the famous Saturday Night Market / Bazaar, a major shopping and entertainment event just a ten-minute walk from the hotel.
experiences.shortDescription: Experience the vibrant local culture at the Saturday Night Market.

nearbyPlaces.name: Anjuna Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Popular tourist beach providing activities such as parasailing, jet ski & banana boat rentals.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Anjuna Beach is a popular tourist destination known for its vibrant atmosphere and a variety of water sports.

nearbyPlaces.name: Calangute Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Big, popular beach with water sports, such as boating, water skiing & parasailing, plus food stalls.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Calangute Beach is a large and popular beach offering various water sports and numerous food stalls.

nearbyPlaces.name: Baga Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Busy beach & recreation area with water sports, eateries, bars, nightspots & a festive atmosphere.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Baga Beach is a lively recreation area featuring water sports, diverse eateries, bars, and vibrant nightspots.

nearbyPlaces.name: Chapora Fort
nearbyPlaces.description: Ruined centuries-old fortress on a headland, a popular vantage point for sunsets over the sea.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Chapora Fort is a historic ruined fortress offering stunning sunset views over the sea.

nearbyPlaces.name: Fort Aguada
nearbyPlaces.description: 1612 Portuguese fortress offering ocean views & an abandoned lighthouse erected in 1864.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Fort Aguada is a 17th-century Portuguese fortress featuring panoramic ocean views and an old lighthouse.

nearbyPlaces.name: Candolim Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Sunset views & parasailing on a sandy shore with shacks for beer & seafood, plus a nearby market.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Candolim Beach offers stunning sunset views and exciting parasailing opportunities. Enjoy local beer and seafood at the beach shacks, with a market conveniently located nearby.

nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Experience the lively atmosphere of Anjuna Flea Market, a bustling hub for unique souvenirs, trendy clothing, and authentic local crafts.

nearbyPlaces.name: Ozran Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Ozran Beach, also known as Little Vagator, is a picturesque beach known for its serene atmosphere, stunning sunsets, and unique rock formations.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Discover the tranquil beauty of Ozran Beach, a hidden gem offering breathtaking sunsets and a peaceful escape from the crowds.

nearbyPlaces.name: Vagator Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Vagator Beach is a stunning beach known for its dramatic red cliffs, soft white sands, and two freshwater springs. It's divided into Big Vagator and Little Vagator (Ozran Beach), offering different vibes from lively shacks to serene spots.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: A picturesque beach with red cliffs and white sands, divided into two sections offering diverse experiences.

nearbyPlaces.name: Aguada Fort
nearbyPlaces.description: Aguada Fort is a 17th-century Portuguese fort overlooking the Arabian Sea. It boasts a lighthouse and offers panoramic views, making it a significant historical landmark.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: A historic 17th-century Portuguese fort with a lighthouse, offering panoramic views of the Arabian Sea.

nearbyPlaces.name: Morjim Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Morjim Beach, also known as 'Little Russia', is a tranquil beach famous for being a nesting site for Olive Ridley sea turtles. It's a serene escape with a laid-back atmosphere.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: A tranquil beach known as 'Little Russia' and a nesting site for Olive Ridley sea turtles.

nearbyPlaces.name: Ashwem Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Ashwem Beach is a quiet and clean beach, ideal for those seeking relaxation and solitude. It's known for its beautiful sunsets and a few shacks offering fresh seafood.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: A quiet and clean beach perfect for relaxation, solitude, and enjoying beautiful sunsets.

nearbyPlaces.name: Mandrem Beach
nearbyPlaces.description: Mandrem Beach is a serene and less crowded beach, known for its white sands and calm waters. It's a popular spot for yoga and wellness retreats.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: A serene and less crowded beach with white sands and calm waters, popular for yoga and wellness.

nearbyPlaces.name: Playa Varca
nearbyPlaces.description: Playa Varca is known for its pristine white sands and clear blue waters, offering a luxurious and peaceful beach experience. It's a great spot for long walks and enjoying the sunset.
nearbyPlaces.shortDescription: Pristine white sands and clear blue waters define this luxurious and peaceful beach, ideal for serene walks and sunsets.

nearbyPlaces.name: Playa Cavelossim
nearbyPlaces.description: Playa Cavelossim is a beautiful beach offering a mix of relaxation and water sports. With its clean sands and calm waters, it's perfect for families and adventure seekers alike.

faqs.question: Fine Print / Important Information
faqs.answer: Mandatory charge to be paid at the time of checking for New Year- 31st December: Rs.17999+tax per couple and Rs.6999+tax per child. Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform Park Regis Goa of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. Payment before arrival by bank transfer is required. The property will contact you after you book to provide instructions. Guests under the age of 18 can only check in with a parent or official guardian.

faqs.question: What are the most popular hotels with spa in Goa?
faqs.answer: Some of most popular hotels in Goa with exceptional spa facilities includes Chances Resort and Casino An Indy Resort, Kenilworth Resort & Spa, Soul Vacation Resort and Spa, Colva, Taj Cidade de Goa Heritage, Goa, Park Inn by Radisson Goa Candolim

faqs.question: What are the customer ratings for Park Regis hotel?
faqs.answer: Overall rating for hotel Park Regis is 3.6/5. This is based on the ratings given by 347 guests on Goibibo. You can read detailed reviews of guests and also check photos uploaded by the guests on Goibibo.

faqs.question: How many types of rooms are available at Hotel Park Regis?
faqs.answer: Hotel Park Regis has 6 types of rooms.

faqs.question: What are the check-in and check-out timings at Park Regis?
faqs.answer: Check in starts at 2 PM in Park Regis and check out timing is 11 AM. For early check-in or late check-out, you can contact the hotel directly. The front desk is available 24 hours a day for your help.

faqs.question: What are the best hotels for business travelers in Goa?
faqs.answer: The best hotels for business travelers in Goa include Royal Orchid Beach Resort & Spa, Acron Waterfront Resort, O Hotel Goa, Candolim Beach

faqs.question: Does Park Regis Goa provide Wi-Fi access?
faqs.answer: Yes, Park Regis Goa offers free Wi-Fi and internet access.

faqs.question: Are there a swimming pool, gym, or spa at Park Regis Goa?
faqs.answer: Yes, Park Regis Goa features an outdoor swimming pool, a fitness center, and a spa.

faqs.question: What dining options are available at Park Regis Goa?
faqs.answer: Park Regis Goa has several dining options, including Kai Asian Speciality Restaurant, Spice’d Coffee Shop, Piano Bar, and Kai – Pool Bar.

faqs.question: Does Park Regis Goa offer parking facilities?
faqs.answer: Yes, Park Regis Goa offers guest parking. Some platforms indicate free parking is available.

policies.cancellationPolicy: Cancellation and prepayment policies vary according to accommodation type. Free Cancellation(100% refund) if you cancel this booking before check-in time.
